name: Srinivas Kothapalli
title: Data Platform Architect & Technology Leader
bio: A seasoned technologist with over twelve years of specialized expertise in NoSQL databases, data storage and transport tools, and cloud platforms. Experience spans engineering, architecture, development, operations, and customer success—delivering end-to-end governance for enterprise-scale data platforms, products, and applications. With a formal background in economics, the focus is on scalable, resilient systems that drive business expansion while maintaining cost efficiency and operational excellence.
